result.result:
## Shipped this week on agent-office (Apr 13–18)

**Foundation & scaffolding (Apr 13)** — Phases 1–4 landed in quick succession: `bd59458` Foundation, `6a1ede2` Agent Core (personas/skills/resolver/launcher), `ca066d7` Memory Engine (domain-scoped queries + injector), `eaebe7c` Phase 4 Office UI with animated scene.

**Pixel-art engine extraction (Apr 14)** — Broke out pixel-agents into reusable modules: constants/types (`a88a3c6`), sprites (`54fcd13`), floor/wall tiles (`00cdc7b`), layout (`9df83eb`), core engine (`769983d`), browser asset loader (`fd62f21`). Wired into a 3-column dashboard (`68467b0`, `6ac04c0`) with `OfficeCanvas` React wrapper (`c8c8f57`).

**Claude-mem integration (Apr 14)** — Read-only SQLite adapter (`d109f26`), persona-to-observation heuristic filter (`e079b4f`), connect-on-boot (`3842a50`), `LaunchPreview` component surfacing last session + memories + skills (`27cb1d3`), iTerm2 spawn (`64ed75e`). Merged as Phase 4.5+4.6 in `6b61356`.

**Phase 5 telemetry (Apr 15)** — Provider adapters, office state, portfolio stats (`4d9806d`), redesigned picker with provider-aware preview (`42aab52`), local skill roots (`a4cb528`), merged `3199451`.

**Provider-neutral history + doctor (Apr 16)** — `9c4afb4` history ingestion, `3b9f1a9` doctor command, plus presence/idle-grace fixes (`a8f6bd4`, `aaa47ed`) and Codex history enrichment (`fc03de3`).

**Unified memory + persona brief (Apr 18)** — Biggest day. `4d9a58a` persona-scoped brief generator, `17bf243` wired into live launch, `ec56fb9` rendered in LaunchPreview, `2dbef00` unified memory stats + semantic search (dropping claude-mem fallback), `3c1cf94` surfaced in project picker, `3b6c0b4` consolidated 4 dialogs into one `LaunchWizard` modal. Also: `01f2a70` Playwright LinkedIn carousel capture, `40c5014` bench harness for brief-vs-raw token savings, `d5da889` simplified office floor to Boss/Workspace/Dungeon + Fixer, `18e1cbb` README rewrite around the unified-memory USP.

**Uncertain / not verified**
- I didn't read the actual diffs, so line-level claims (e.g. what the "brief" format looks like, exact APIs of the memory adapter) aren't backed up here — only commit subjects.
- `bench/`, `scripts/bench-aggregate.mjs`, `scripts/bench-judge.mjs`, `scripts/bench-whitepaper.mjs` are **still untracked** — they exist locally but aren't in any commit yet.
- `feature/phase-5-telemetry` branch still exists locally alongside main; I didn't check whether it's fully merged or has unique commits.
